name: Gnyani Enugandula
summary: Data engineer with experience building scalable pipelines, analytics models, and reliable cloud data platforms for product and business stakeholders.

bullets: Built batch and streaming pipelines in Python and Spark that processed 120M events daily into Snowflake models.
Designed Airflow orchestration and alerting that cut failed pipeline recovery time by 45%.
Partnered with analytics and finance stakeholders to define trusted KPI datasets and improve executive reporting.
Developed SQL transformations and quality checks for customer and product data used in weekly business reviews.
Automated ingestion from partner APIs into S3 and Redshift, reducing manual analyst work by 12 hours per week.

projects.name: Real-Time Metrics Platform
bullets: Built a Kafka and Spark streaming project that surfaced customer behavior metrics within five minutes.
Created dimensional warehouse models and dashboards for product teams to track conversion performance.
